'''βàöl-dh-zh-zh''' ('''kaladhzhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cementify|cementify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cementify|cementify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöl-dh-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kaladhzhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladhzhezhoko|thiladhzhezhoko]] || [[word:jiladhzhezhoko|jiladhzhezhoko]] || [[word:shiladhzhezhoko|shiladhzhezhoko]] || [[word:kiladhzhezhoko|kiladhzhezhoko]]
